# Service API: REST reference

ServiceService manages services inside workspaces: it lets clients create, read, list, update, archive, and restore them.

## Methods

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [List](./ListServices.md) | Returns a paginated list of services under the specified workspace UUID. |
| [Create](./CreateService.md) | Creates a new service under the specified workspace UUID. |
| [Get](./GetService.md) | Returns a single service by its UUID. |
| [Delete](./DeleteService.md) | Soft-deletes a service by its UUID. |
| [Undelete](./UndeleteService.md) | Restores a previously soft-deleted service. |
| [Update](./UpdateService.md) | Updates mutable fields of an existing service. |
